title: BJP alleges Rahul Gandhi acted like ‘Urban Naxal’, orchestrated AI Summit protest
description: New Delhi, Feb 22, 2026 As Prime Minister Narendra Modi launched a blistering attack on the Congress over the AI Summit protest, senior Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) leaders, on Sunday, accused the Lok Sabha Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi of “defaming India on the global stage” and claimed the demonstration exposed the deepening crisis within [...]The post BJP alleges Rahul Gandhi acted like ‘Urban Naxal’, orchestrated AI Summit protest appeared first on Yes Punjab News.

title: Democrats and Republicans agree on one thing: regulating the use of AI
description: Republicans and Democrats in state capitols across the country agree on some things when it comes to regulating Artificial Intelligence and data centers.

title: ‘Humans use lot of energy too’: OpenAI’s Sam Altman on resources consumed by AI, data centres
description: Altman's remarks at Express Adda have sparked an online debate about the energy consumption of data centres used to train and power AI models.

title: World : Shaping A Human-Centric Future For AI
description: By Narendra Modi KUALA LUMPUR, Feb 22 (Bernama) -- At a defining moment in human history, the world gathered at the AI Impact Summit 2026 in New Delhi.

title: ADB approves $950,000 for AI health projects in Pakistan, Bangladesh, Indonesia
description: Technical assistance to assess AI in diagnosis, treatment, management and build governance roadmapsThe post ADB approves $950,000 for AI health projects in Pakistan, Bangladesh, Indonesia appeared first on Profit by Pakistan Today.
